memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &Credentials, Settings &Settings, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, const EntitlementWPtr InEntitlementWeak, const ItemWPtr InItemWeak, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: User

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &Credentials, Settings &Settings, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, const EntitlementWPtr InEntitlementWeak, const ItemWPtr InItemWeak, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform, FString const &InDeviceId=TEXT(""), FString const &InMacAddress=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: User

memberdef.argsstring: (FUpgradeNotif)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_DELEGATE

briefdescription.para: delegate for handling upgrade headless account notification.
These events happen before every login event, such as clearing CredentialRef post-auth info.

listitem.para: Call this last, just before the actual login call.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LoginWithUsername

briefdescription.para: Log in with email/username account.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or username.
Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LoginWithUsername

briefdescription.para: Log in with email/username account with 2FA enable.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or username.
Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &, bool bRememberMe=false)
memberdef.name: LoginWithUsernameV3

briefdescription.para: Log in with email/username account using v3 endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or username.
Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberMe=false)
memberdef.name: LoginWithUsernameV3

briefdescription.para: Log in with email/username account using v3 endpoint with 2FA enable.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or username.
Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberMe=false)
memberdef.name: LoginWithUsernameV4

briefdescription.para: Log in with email/username account using v4 endpoint with 2FA enable.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or username.
Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &, bool bCreateHeadless=true)
memberdef.name: LoginWithDeviceId

briefdescription.para: Log in with device ID (anonymous log in).

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true)
memberdef.name: LoginWithDeviceId

briefdescription.para: Log in with device ID (anonymous log in).

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true)
memberdef.name: LoginWithDeviceIdV4

briefdescription.para: Log in with device ID (anonymous log in).

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &PlatformToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LoginWithOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: Log in with another platform account e.g. Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitch, etc.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type that chosen by user to log in.
Authentication code that provided by another platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &PlatformToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={})
memberdef.name: LoginWithOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: Log in with another platform account e.g. Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitch, etc. with 2FA enable.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type that chosen by user to log in.
Authentication code that provided by another platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If directly create new account when not linked yet, default value is true
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformId, FString const &PlatformToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={})
memberdef.name: LoginWithOtherPlatformId

briefdescription.para: Log in with another platform Id account e.g. Steam, Google, Twitch, etc especially to support OIDC (with 2FA enable).

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC)
Authentication code that provided by another platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If directly create new account when not linked yet, default value is true
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={})
memberdef.name: LoginWithOtherPlatformV4

briefdescription.para: Log in with another platform account e.g. Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitch, etc. with 2FA enable.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type that chosen by user to log in.
Authentication code that provided by another platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If directly create new account when not linked yet, default value is true
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformId, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={})
memberdef.name: LoginWithOtherPlatformIdV4

briefdescription.para: Log in with another platform Id account e.g. Steam, Google, Twitch, etc especially to support OIDC (with 2FA enable).

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC)
Authentication code that provided by another platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If directly create new account when not linked yet, default value is true
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType NativePlatform, FString const &NativePlatformToken, EAccelBytePlatformType SecondaryPlatform, FString const &SecondaryPlatformToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LoginWithSimultaneousPlatform

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &NativePlatform, FString const &NativePlatformToken, FString const &SecondaryPlatform, FString const &SecondaryPlatformToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LoginWithSimultaneousPlatform

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MfaToken, EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType AuthFactorType, FString const &Code, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberDevice=false)
memberdef.name: VerifyLoginWithNewDevice2FAEnabled

briefdescription.para: Verify log in with new device when user enabled 2FA.

parameterdescription.para: return from BE when user login with new device and 2FA enabled.
2FA factor used. Could be "authenticator" or "backupCode". User should make sure what type used
auth code from 3rd party authenticator or backupCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MfaToken, EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType AuthFactorType, FString const &Code, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberDevice=false)
memberdef.name: VerifyLoginWithNewDevice2FAEnabledV4

briefdescription.para: Verify log in with new device when user enabled 2FA.

parameterdescription.para: return from BE when user login with new device and 2FA enabled.
2FA factor used. Could be "authenticator" or "backupCode". User should make sure what type used
auth code from 3rd party authenticator or backupCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &RefreshToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: login with refresh token

parameterdescription.para: the refresh token for login.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: LoginWithRefreshToken

briefdescription.para: login with refresh token

parameterdescription.para: the refresh token for login.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Target platform user id to cache.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &RefreshToken=TEXT(""), FString const &PlatformUserId=TEXT(""))

briefdescription.para: login with refresh token

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
the refresh token for login.
Target platform user id to cache.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType NativePlatform, FString const &NativePlatformToken, THandler< FPlatformTokenRefreshResponse > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RefreshPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Refresh the platform token that is stored in the IAM backend. Therefore we can prevent expiration on the backend. This endpoint also not generate any event or AB Access/Refresh Token.

parameterdescription.para: The targeted platform to be refreshed.
The platform token that will used to refresh IAM storage.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &NativePlatform, FString const &NativePlatformToken, THandler< FPlatformTokenRefreshResponse > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RefreshPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Refresh the platform token that is stored in the IAM backend. Therefore we can prevent expiration on the backend. This endpoint also not generate any event or AB Access/Refresh Token.

parameterdescription.para: The targeted platform to be refreshed.
The platform token that will used to refresh IAM storage.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformUserID, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: TryRelogin

briefdescription.para: Relogin using the previously logged-in platform account. WINDOWS ONLY.

parameterdescription.para: The user ID that used previously and used .
This will be called when the provided Platform User Account is acknowledged and not expired yet. Continue the session.
This will be called when the Platform User Account that provided is not known yet — OR it existed but already expired.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformUserID, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: TryRelogin

briefdescription.para: Relogin using the previously logged-in platform account. WINDOWS ONLY.

parameterdescription.para: The user ID that used previously and used .
This will be called when the provided Platform User Account is acknowledged and not expired yet. Continue the session.
This will be called when the Platform User Account that provided is not known yet — OR it existed but already expired.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformUserID, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLoginQueueTicketInfo > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: TryReloginV4

briefdescription.para: Relogin using the previously logged-in platform account. WINDOWS ONLY.

parameterdescription.para: The user ID that used previously and used .
This will be called when the provided Platform User Account is acknowledged and not expired yet. Continue the session.
This will be called when the Platform User Account that provided is not known yet — OR it existed but already expired.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Create Headless Account And Login.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &LoginTicket, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ClaimAccessToken

briefdescription.para: Claim Access Token using Login Ticket.

parameterdescription.para: Login Ticket to claim the access token
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: Logout

briefdescription.para: [DEPRECATED] Log out current user session. Access tokens, user ID, and other credentials from memory will be removed.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LogoutV3

briefdescription.para: Log out current user session. Access tokens, user ID, and other credentials from memory will be removed.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Remove access tokens, user ID, and other credentials from memory.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FString const &DisplayName, FString const &Country, FString const &DateOfBirth, THandler< FRegisterResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &UniqueDisplayName=TEXT(""), FString const &Code=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: Register

briefdescription.para: This function will register a new user with email-based account.

parameterdescription.para: Email address of the user, can be used as login username.
The Password.
The DisplayName.
User's country, ISO3166-1 alpha-2 two letter, e.g. US.
User's date of birth, valid values are between 1905-01-01 until current date.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If uniqueDisplayNameEnabled config is enabled, this param is required to be filled.
If mandatoryEmailVerificationEnabled config is enabled, this param is required. Retrieved from user email. Use SendVerificationCodeToNewUser for sending the code to user email.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EmailAddress, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FString const &DisplayName, FString const &Country, FString const &DateOfBirth, THandler< FRegisterResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &UniqueDisplayName=TEXT(""), FString const &Code=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: Registerv2

briefdescription.para: This function will register a new user with email-based account.

parameterdescription.para: Email address of the user, can be used as login username.
The username can be used as login username, case insensitive, alphanumeric with allowed symbols underscore (_) and dot (.).
The Password.
The DisplayName.
User's country, ISO3166-1 alpha-2 two letter, e.g. US.
User's date of birth, valid values are between 1905-01-01 until current date.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If uniqueDisplayNameEnabled config is enabled, this param is required to be filled.
If mandatoryEmailVerificationEnabled config is enabled, this param is required. Retrieved from user email. Use SendVerificationCodeToNewUser for sending the code to user email.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FRegisterRequestv3 const &RegisterRequest, THandler< FRegisterResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: Registerv3

briefdescription.para: This function will register a new user with email-based account and complete agreement.

parameterdescription.para: invoke Accepted Policies, EmailAddress, Username, Password, Display Name, Country and Date of Birth
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bIncludeAllPlatforms=false)
memberdef.name: GetData

briefdescription.para: This function will get data of currently logged in user.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will return all 3rd party platform accounts linked to account. Default is False

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FGetUserBansResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserBanHistory

briefdescription.para: This function will get the current user's ban history in detail.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FGetUserBansResponse
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FGetUserBanHistoryOptionalParams const &OptionalParameter, THandler< FGetUserBansResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserBanHistory

briefdescription.para: This function will get the current user's ban history in detail.

parameterdescription.para: Optional parameters that can be set.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FGetUserBansResponse
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bNeedVerificationCode=false)
memberdef.name: Upgrade

briefdescription.para: This function will upgrade user's headless account. You may call SendUserAccountVerificationCode afterwards. Headless account is an account that doesn't have an email and password. If user logs in with a device/platform and they cannot login with email-and-password, their account is considered as a headless account. Therefore, the function requests user’s Username and Password for parameters.

parameterdescription.para: The EmailAddress of the user.
The Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Will send verification code to email if true, default false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EmailAddress, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: Upgradev2

briefdescription.para: This function will upgrade user's headless account. You may call SendUserAccountVerificationCode afterwards. Headless account is an account that doesn't have an email and password. If user logs in with a device/platform and they cannot login with email-and-password, their account is considered as a headless account. Therefore, the function requests user’s Username and Password for parameters.

parameterdescription.para: The EmailAddress of the user.
The Username.
The Password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendVerificationCode

briefdescription.para: Verify user's email. User should login with email and password first to get access token.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &VerificationCode, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: Verify

briefdescription.para: This function will verify the registered email after user receives verification code sent with ::SendUserAccountVerificationCode() to their email.

parameterdescription.para: The VerificationCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EmailAddress, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendResetPasswordCode

briefdescription.para: Send a request to reset user's password. For some reason the endpoint uses HTTP basic authentication instead of bearer, because you know... our IAM is very inconsistent.

parameterdescription.para: User email address or phone number.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &VerificationCode, FString const &EmailAddress, FString const &NewPassword, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ResetPassword

briefdescription.para: Reset user's password with sent verification code.

detaileddescription.para:
SendPasswordResetCode()
EmailAddress
User email address or phone number.
VerificationCode
Code sent to the email address.
NewPassword
The new password.
OnSuccess
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
OnError
This will be called when the operation failed.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EmailAddress, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendUpgradeVerificationCode

briefdescription.para: This function should be done before user upgrade their headless account. After this function successfully called, obtain the verification code from the submitted email. Then call UpgradeHeadlessAccountWithVerificationCode function afterwards.

parameterdescription.para: Email or phone number that will be used to upgrade the headless account.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendUpdateEmailVerificationCode

briefdescription.para: Send request verification code with Change email context. User should login with email and password first to get access token.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FString const &VerificationCode, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &UniqueDisplayName=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: UpgradeAndVerify

briefdescription.para: This function should be called after you call SendUserUpgradeVerificationCode and obtain verification code.

parameterdescription.para: Email or phone number that will be used to upgrade the headless account.
User's password.
User's verification code that obtained from email.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If uniqueDisplayNameEnabled config is enabled, this param is required to be filled.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUpgradeAndVerifyRequest const &UpgradeAndVerifyRequest, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpgradeAndVerify2

briefdescription.para: This function should be called after you call SendUpgradeVerificationCode and obtain verification code.

parameterdescription.para: contain user data will be used to upgrade the headless account.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FPagedPlatformLinks > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPlatformLinks

briefdescription.para: This function gets user's platform accounts linked to user’s account.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The res

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &Ticket, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function links user's current account to their other account in other platform. Ticket for each platform (PlatformToken) can be obtained from browser with platform linking URL (e.g. Facebook, Google, Twitch platform). The browser will redirect the URL to a site with a code in form of parameter URL.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
The Ticket.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &Ticket, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function links user's current account to their other account in other platform. Ticket for each platform (PlatformToken) can be obtained from browser with platform linking URL (e.g. Facebook, Google, Twitch platform). The browser will redirect the URL to a site with a code in form of parameter URL.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
The Ticket.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformId, FString const &Ticket, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LinkOtherPlatformId

briefdescription.para: This function links user's current account to their other account in other platform, especially to support OIDC Ticket for each platform (PlatformToken) can be obtained from browser with platform linking URL The browser will redirect the URL to a site with a code in form of parameter URL.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC)
The Ticket.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &PlatformUserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ForcedLinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function forced links user's current account to their other account in other platform. Use this only if the general LinkOtherPlatform get conflicted and getting confirmation from user.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
The UserId from the other platfrom you want to link.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &PlatformUserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ForcedLinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function forced links user's current account to their other account in other platform. Use this only if the general LinkOtherPlatform get conflicted and getting confirmation from user.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
The UserId from the other platfrom you want to link.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function unlinks user's current account from their other account in other platform.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future. Please use same function with the FCustomErrorHandler parameter instead.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlinkOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function unlinks user's current account from their other account in other platform.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlinkOtherPlatformId

briefdescription.para: This function unlinks user's current account from their other account in other platform, especially to support OIDC.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC)
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlinkAllOtherPlatform

briefdescription.para: This function unlinks all the user's current account from their other accounts in other platforms.

parameterdescription.para: The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: Use this API to unlink all the user's current account from their other accounts in other platforms within the game namespace. It resolves issues with the old API by ensuring successful unlinking across multiple namespaces. After calling this API, if a user logs in to any namespace with the same 3rd platform account, they will be logged in as a different account.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PlatformId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlinkAllOtherPlatformId

briefdescription.para: This function unlinks all the user's current account from their other accounts in other platforms, especially to support OIDC.

parameterdescription.para: Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: Use this API to unlink all the user's current account from their other accounts in other platforms within the game namespace. It resolves issues with the old API by ensuring successful unlinking across multiple namespaces. After calling this API, if a user logs in to any namespace with the same 3rd platform account, they will be logged in as a different account.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, THandler< FPagedPublicUsersInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SearchUsers

briefdescription.para: This function will search user by their Username or Display Name. The query will be used to find the user with the most approximate username or display name.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's Username or Display Name.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FPagedPublicUsersInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FPagedPublicUsersInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SearchUsers

briefdescription.para: This function will search user by their Username or Display Name. The query will be used to find the user with the most approximate username or display name.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's Username or Display Name.
Targeted offset query filter.
Targeted limit query filter.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FPagedPublicUsersInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, EAccelByteSearchPlatformType PlatformBy, THandler< FPagedPublicUsersInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=100)
memberdef.name: SearchUsers

briefdescription.para: This function will search user by their Username or Display Name. The query will be used to find the user with the most approximate username or display name.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's Username or Display Name.
The PlatformType (Steam, PS4, Xbox, etc).
Filter the responded PagedPublicUsersInfo by SearchPlatformType.
Targeted offset query filter.
Targeted limit query filter.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FPagedPublicUsersInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, FString const &PlatformId, EAccelByteSearchPlatformType PlatformBy, THandler< FPagedPublicUsersInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=100)
memberdef.name: SearchUsers

briefdescription.para: Searches for users on third-party platforms using their Username or Display Name. This function specifically targets users on platforms and utilizes the platform's DisplayName for the search.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's Username or Display Name.
Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC).
Filter the responded PagedPublicUsersInfo by SearchPlatformType.
Targeted offset query filter.
Targeted limit query filter.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FPagedPublicUsersInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, EAccelByteSearchType By, THandler< FPagedPublicUsersInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=100, FString const &PlatformId=TEXT(""), EAccelByteSearchPlatformType PlatformBy=EAccelByteSearchPlatformType::NONE)
memberdef.name: SearchUsers

briefdescription.para: Searches for users on third-party platforms using their Username or Display Name. This function specifically targets users on platforms and utilizes the platform's DisplayName for the search.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's Username or Display Name.
Filter the responded PagedPublicUsersInfo by SearchType. Choose the SearchType.ALL if you want to be responded with all query type.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FPagedPublicUsersInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Targeted offset query filter.
Targeted limit query filter.
Specify platform type, string type of this field makes support OpenID Connect (OIDC).
Filter the responded PagedPublicUsersInfo by SearchPlatformType.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FSimpleUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserByUserId

briefdescription.para: DEPRECATED: This function is no longer supported and will be removed in future releases. This function will search user by UserId and the endpoint version is V3.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, FString const &OtherPlatformUserId, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserPublicInfoByOtherPlatformUserId

briefdescription.para: This function will get user by other platform user id it linked to. Note : For Nintendo Login you have to add Environment ID Suffix behind platform id with PlatformID:EnvironmentID as format e.g csg123jskansdk:dd1.

parameterdescription.para: Other platform type .
Targeted user's ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUserUpdateRequest const &UpdateRequest, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUser

briefdescription.para: This function for update user account info within the game.

parameterdescription.para: The data you want to update. for DateOfBirth, the format is YYYY-MM-DD.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUpdateEmailRequest const &UpdateEmailRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateEmail

briefdescription.para: This function for update user account info within the game.

parameterdescription.para: Set verify code and new user email address.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, TArray< FString > const &OtherPlatformUserId, THandler< FBulkPlatformUserIdResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRawPuid=false)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserByOtherPlatformUserIds

briefdescription.para: This function will get user(s) by other platform user id(s) it linked to. Note : For Nintendo Login you have to add Environment ID Suffix behind platform id with PlatformID:EnvironmentID as format e.g csg123jskansdk:dd1.

parameterdescription.para: Other platform type.
Targeted user's ID(s).
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FBulkPlatformUserIdResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Show unencrypted platform user id in result (disabled by default).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, TArray< FString > const &OtherPlatformUserId, THandler< FBulkPlatformUserIdResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRawPuid=false, const EAccelBytePidType &PidType=EAccelBytePidType::NONE)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserByOtherPlatformUserIdsV4

briefdescription.para: This function will get user(s) by other platform user id(s) it linked to. maximum users to be queried is 100 userIds if more than 100 userIds is queried, only first 100 will be returned. Note : For Nintendo Login you have to add Environment ID Suffix behind platform id with PlatformID:EnvironmentID as format e.g csg123jskansdk:dd1.

parameterdescription.para: Other platform type.
Targeted user's ID(s).
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FBulkPlatformUserIdResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Show unencrypted platform user id in result (disabled by default).
The type of platform user id (some platforms have different user id type for a given user, such as org scoped id or app scoped id).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FCountryInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetCountryFromIP

briefdescription.para: This function will get country information from user's IP.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FCountryInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< bool > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserEligibleToPlay

briefdescription.para: This function will check whether user can play the game by having it purchased or subscribed.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is boolean.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &LanguageCode, THandler< FInputValidation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bDefaultOnEmpty=true)
memberdef.name: GetInputValidations

briefdescription.para: This function will get user input validation.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted Language Code, using ISO-639
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FInputUserValidation.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Targeted DefaultOnEmpty.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUserInputValidationRequest const &UserInputValidationRequest, THandler< FUserInputValidationResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ValidateUserInput

briefdescription.para: This function will validate user's input This endpoint will check the input validation with profanity filter service Call this endpoint GetInputValidations To check the profanity filter enablement.

parameterdescription.para: List of user input validation request
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUserInputValidationResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FUser2FaBackupCode > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: Enable2FaBackupCode

briefdescription.para: This function will enable 2FA with backupCode.

This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: Disable2FaBackupCode

briefdescription.para: This function will disable 2FA with backupCode.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
[Optional] Token retrieved from multi-factor authentication challenge. Only needed if multi-factor authentication is enabled.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: This function will generate backupCode.

This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FUser2FaBackupCode > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: This function will get backupCode.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUser2FaBackupCode.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &Code=TEXT(""))

briefdescription.para: This function will enable 3rd party authenticator.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The code generated by authenticator app.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: This function will disable 3rd party authenticator.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
[Optional] Token retrieved from multi-factor authentication challenge. Only needed if multi-factor authentication is enabled.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUser2FaSecretKey.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUserUpdateRequest const &UpdateRequest, THandler< FAccountUserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserV3

briefdescription.para: DEPRECATED: This function is no longer supported and will be removed in future releases. This function for update user account info within the game.

parameterdescription.para: The data you want to update. for DateOfBirth, the format is YYYY-MM-DD.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserData.
This will be called when the operation failed. Please use UpdateUser instead.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FLinkHeadlessAccountRequest const &Request, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LinkHeadlessAccountToCurrentFullAccount

briefdescription.para: This function for link headless account to current full account.

parameterdescription.para: Request struct Containing chosen namespace and one time link code.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &OneTimeLinkCode, THandler< FConflictLinkHeadlessAccountResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetConflictResultWhenLinkHeadlessAccountToFullAccount

briefdescription.para: This function to get conflict result when link headless account to current account by one time code.

parameterdescription.para: One time link code value.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is THandler<FConflictLinkHeadlessAccountResult>&
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &DisplayName, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bIsCheckUniqueDisplayName=false)
memberdef.name: CheckUserAccountAvailability

briefdescription.para: Check users's account availability, available only using displayName field If the result is success or no error, it means the account already exists. If a new account is added with the defined display name, the service will be unable to perform the action.

parameterdescription.para: User's display name value to be checked.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FVoidHandler
This will be called when the operation failed.
Check user availability by unique display name. Default as false.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformType PlatformType, THandler< FThirdPartyPlatformTokenData > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RetrieveUserThirdPartyPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: This function is used for retrieving third party platform token for user that login using third party, if user have not link requested platform in game namespace, will try to retrieving third party platform token from publisher namespace. Passing platform group name or it's member will return same access token that can be used across the platform members. Note: The third party platform and platform group covered for this is: (psn) ps4web, (psn) ps4, (psn) ps5, epicgames, twitch, awscognito.

parameterdescription.para: Platform type value.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FThirdPartyPlatformTokenData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FPlatformAccountInfoRequest const &Request, THandler< FAccountUserPlatformInfosResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserOtherPlatformBasicPublicInfo

briefdescription.para: This function will get user basic and public info of 3rd party account.

parameterdescription.para: Request struct containing chosen platformId and userIds.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccountUserPlatformInfos.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserID, THandler< FUserPublicInfoResponseV4 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserPublicInfoByUserId

briefdescription.para: This function will get user public information the specified UserID. This endpoint version is V4.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUserPublicInfoResponseV4.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccountConfiguration AccountConfiguration, THandler< bool > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetAccountConfigurationValue

briefdescription.para: A request to retrieve such of information related to the current account configuration value.

parameterdescription.para: Target account configuration key to retrieve the information.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is bool.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FIAMPublicSystemConfigResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPublicSystemConfigValue

briefdescription.para: A request to public system configuration values.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FIAMPublicSystemConfigResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FUpdatePasswordRequest const &Request, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdatePassword

briefdescription.para: Update current user password.

parameterdescription.para: Details for updating password including mfa token, new password and old password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Code, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: EnableMfaEmail

briefdescription.para: Enable multi-factor authentication with email.

parameterdescription.para: Verification code received from user email.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FDisableMfaEmailRequest const &Request={})
memberdef.name: DisableMfaEmail

briefdescription.para: Disable multi-factor authentication with email.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
[Optional] Token retrieved from multi-factor authentication challenge. Only needed if multi-factor authentication is enabled.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const EAccelByteSendMfaEmailAction Action, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendMfaCodeToEmail

briefdescription.para: Send multi-factor authentication code to email.

parameterdescription.para: Supported action are update password, disable/enable email mfa (use EAccelByteSendMfaEmailAction::DisableMFAEmail for disable/enable).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FMfaStatusResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetMfaStatus

briefdescription.para: Get multi-factor authentication status for current user.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType const &Factor, FString const &Code, THandler< FVerifyMfaResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: VerifyMfaCode

briefdescription.para: Verify code from MFA to retrieve MFA Token.

parameterdescription.para: Factor used for multi-factor authentication (e.g. email, backup codes or authenticator app).
The code received from multi-factor authentication.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FSendVerificationCodeToNewUserRequest const &Request, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendVerificationCodeToNewUser

briefdescription.para: Send verification code to new unregistered account's email address.

parameterdescription.para: The request for sending a new user a verification code to email.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is bool.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FOauth2Token const &Response, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &CachedTokenKey)
memberdef.name: ProcessLoginResponse

briefdescription.para: Validate Login response data and call the corresponding delegate function.

parameterdescription.para: the Login response data.
delegate function for successful Login.
delegate function for error Login.
The cached token key.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOauth2Token const &Response, FString const &CachedTokenKey)
memberdef.name: OnLoginSuccess

briefdescription.para: General handler for LoginWith* success; mostly a multicast callback handler.

parameterdescription.para: delegate function for successful Login.
the Login response data.
The cached token key.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CachedTokenKey, FString const &RefreshToken, FDateTime const &ExpireDate)
memberdef.name: SaveCachedTokenToLocalDataStorage

briefdescription.para: Saving chached token as a file to Local Data Storage. This functionality is working on Windows Platform, MAC and Linux only at the moment.

parameterdescription.para: The cached token key.
The refresh token.
The expiry date.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ErrorMessage, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: TriggerInvalidRequestError

briefdescription.para: Internal utilities to trigger invalid request error for User API.

parameterdescription.para: message to pass for login error.
delegate function for error Login.

briefdescription.para: User management API for creating user, verifying user, and resetting password.
